forks.name: vanilla
forks.note: Upstream ggml-org/llama.cpp. Stable = latest release tag (bXXXX); nightly = master HEAD.

forks.name: turboquant
forks.note: TurboQuant+ KV/weight quantization. Stable = latest release (tqp-vX.Y.Z, targetCommitish is a branch -> resolved to SHA); nightly = branch HEAD.

forks.name: prism
forks.note: Adds Q2_0 ternary quantization (Bonsai models). Stable = latest release (prism-bXXXX-<sha>); nightly = prism branch HEAD.

forks.name: atomic
forks.note: Fork of TheTom + Gemma4 MTP and Qwen3.6 NextN. Stable = latest release commit (targetCommitish, release binaries ignored); nightly = branch HEAD. We rebuild CUDA ourselves.
